summary:
The fix is complete. The test now passes with 100/100 increments.

The issue was the race condition in `app/counter.js:15-25` where multiple concurrent requests would read the same value, increment it, and write back the same result, causing lost increments.

The solution was to replace the manual read-modify-write pattern with Redis's atomic `INCR` command, which handles the increment operation atomically on the server side.
